diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_contacts_csv_and_update.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_contacts_csv_and_update.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f48611b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_contacts_csv_and_update.py
@@ -0,0 +1,394 @@
+"""Tests for SMB CRM contact enrichment: CSV import, PATCH, phone normalization, loan types."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, MagicMock, patch
+
+from fastapi import HTTPException
+
+from agent.services.smbcontacts.loan_types import resolve_loan_type
+from agent.services.smbcontacts.schemas import CreateSMBContactRequest, UpdateSMBContactRequest
+from agent.services.smbcontacts import service as smb_contact_service
+
+
+class LoanTypeResolverTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_resolves_canonical_id(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(resolve_loan_type("sba7a"), "sba7a")
+
+    def test_resolves_label(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(resolve_loan_type("SBA 7(a) Loan"), "sba7a")
+
+    def test_resolves_secondary_label(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(resolve_loan_type("SBA 504 Loan"), "sba504")
+
+    def test_resolves_alias(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(resolve_loan_type("line of credit"), "loc")
+
+    def test_unknown_returns_none(self) -> None:
+        self.assertIsNone(resolve_loan_type("not-a-real-loan"))
+
+
+class LoanTypeSchemaNormalizationTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_create_request_normalizes_display_label(self) -> None:
+        req = CreateSMBContactRequest(
+            first_name="Ravi",
+            email="ravi@example.com",
+            loan_type="SBA 7(a) Loan",
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(req.loan_type, "sba7a")
+
+    def test_update_request_normalizes_display_label(self) -> None:
+        req = UpdateSMBContactRequest(loan_type="SBA 504 Loan")
+        self.assertEqual(req.loan_type, "sba504")
+
+
+class PhoneNormalizationTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_normalize_us_number(self) -> None:
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            result = smb_contact_service.normalize_mobile_for_storage("(512) 555-0142")
+        self.assertTrue(result.startswith("+1"))
+
+    def test_try_normalize_indian_number_without_country_code(self) -> None:
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            result = smb_contact_service.try_normalize_mobile("8050306043")
+        self.assertEqual(result, "+918050306043")
+
+    def test_try_normalize_explicit_international(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(
+            smb_contact_service.try_normalize_mobile("+918050306043"),
+            "+918050306043",
+        )
+
+    def test_try_normalize_invalid_returns_none(self) -> None:
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            self.assertIsNone(smb_contact_service.try_normalize_mobile("abc"))
+
+
+class ImportContactsCsvTests(unittest.IsolatedAsyncioTestCase):
+    async def test_imports_row_with_optional_last_name_and_warnings(self) -> None:
+        csv_text = (
+            "first_name,last_name,email,mobile,loan_type,monthly_revenue,time_in_business\n"
+            "Jane,,jane@example.com,,bad-type,20k,2 years\n"
+            "Bob,Smith,bob@example.com,(512) 555-0199,sba7a,,\n"
+        ).encode("utf-8")
+
+        find_chain = MagicMock()
+        find_chain.project.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=[])
+
+        with patch("agent.services.smbcontacts.service.SMBContact") as contact_cls:
+            contact_cls.find.return_value = find_chain
+            contact_cls.insert_many = AsyncMock()
+            contact_cls.side_effect = lambda **kwargs: MagicMock(**kwargs)
+            result = await smb_contact_service.import_contacts_csv(csv_text, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(result.total_rows, 2)
+        self.assertEqual(result.imported, 2)
+        self.assertEqual(result.skipped, 0)
+        self.assertGreaterEqual(result.warnings, 2)
+        contact_cls.insert_many.assert_awaited_once()
+        inserted = contact_cls.insert_many.await_args.args[0]
+        self.assertEqual(len(inserted), 2)
+
+    async def test_imports_display_label_loan_type_as_canonical_id(self) -> None:
+        csv_text = (
+            "first_name,last_name,email,loan_type\n"
+            "Ravi,Kumar,ravi@example.com,SBA 504 Loan\n"
+        ).encode("utf-8")
+
+        find_chain = MagicMock()
+        find_chain.project.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=[])
+
+        with patch("agent.services.smbcontacts.service.SMBContact") as contact_cls:
+            contact_cls.find.return_value = find_chain
+            contact_cls.insert_many = AsyncMock()
+            contact_cls.side_effect = lambda **kwargs: MagicMock(**kwargs)
+            result = await smb_contact_service.import_contacts_csv(csv_text, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(result.imported, 1)
+        inserted = contact_cls.insert_many.await_args.args[0]
+        self.assertEqual(inserted[0].loan_type, "sba504")
+
+    async def test_skips_row_missing_email(self) -> None:
+        csv_text = "first_name,last_name,email,mobile\nJohn,Smith,,555-0100\n".encode("utf-8")
+
+        find_chain = MagicMock()
+        find_chain.project.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=[])
+
+        with patch("agent.services.smbcontacts.service.SMBContact") as contact_cls:
+            contact_cls.find.return_value = find_chain
+            contact_cls.insert_many = AsyncMock()
+            result = await smb_contact_service.import_contacts_csv(csv_text, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(result.imported, 0)
+        self.assertEqual(result.skipped, 1)
+        contact_cls.insert_many.assert_not_awaited()
+
+    async def test_updates_existing_contact_mobile_on_duplicate_email(self) -> None:
+        csv_text = (
+            "first_name,last_name,email,mobile\n"
+            "Jim,,lpappajohn@santoracpa.com,3027373362\n"
+        ).encode("utf-8")
+
+        existing = MagicMock()
+        existing.id = "contact-1"
+        existing.email = "lpappajohn@santoracpa.com"
+        existing.first_name = "Jim"
+        existing.last_name = ""
+        existing.mobile = ""
+        existing.address = None
+        existing.city = None
+        existing.state = None
+        existing.zip = None
+        existing.business_name = "Santora Baffone Group"
+        existing.industry = None
+        existing.monthly_revenue = None
+        existing.time_in_business = None
+        existing.loan_type = "mca"
+        existing.tags = []
+        existing.save = AsyncMock()
+
+        find_chain = MagicMock()
+        find_chain.project.return_value.to_list = AsyncMock(return_value=[existing])
+
+        with patch("agent.services.smbcontacts.service.SMBContact") as contact_cls, patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_locked_contact_ids",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=set(),
+        ):
+            contact_cls.find.return_value = find_chain
+            contact_cls.insert_many = AsyncMock()
+            result = await smb_contact_service.import_contacts_csv(csv_text, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        self.assertEqual(result.imported, 0)
+        self.assertEqual(result.updated, 1)
+        self.assertEqual(existing.mobile, "+13027373362")
+        existing.save.assert_awaited_once()
+        contact_cls.insert_many.assert_not_awaited()
+
+
+class UpdateContactIdentityLockTests(unittest.IsolatedAsyncioTestCase):
+    def _mock_contact(self) -> MagicMock:
+        contact = MagicMock()
+        contact.id = "contact-1"
+        contact.lender_id = "lender-1"
+        contact.first_name = "Jane"
+        contact.last_name = "Doe"
+        contact.email = "jane@example.com"
+        contact.mobile = "+15125550142"
+        contact.source = "manual"
+        contact.monthly_revenue = None
+        contact.loan_type = None
+        contact.loan_amount = None
+        contact.comment = None
+        contact.tags = []
+        contact.address = None
+        contact.city = None
+        contact.state = None
+        contact.zip = None
+        contact.business_name = None
+        contact.industry = None
+        contact.time_in_business = None
+        contact.status = "NEW"
+        contact.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
+        contact.updated_at = None
+        contact.save = AsyncMock()
+        return contact
+
+    async def test_blocks_identity_field_when_locked(self) -> None:
+        contact = self._mock_contact()
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_get_lender_contact",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=contact,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_is_identity_locked",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=True,
+        ):
+            with self.assertRaises(HTTPException) as ctx:
+                await smb_contact_service.update_smb_contact(
+                    "contact-1",
+                    "lender-1",
+                    UpdateSMBContactRequest(first_name="Janet"),
+                )
+
+        self.assertEqual(ctx.exception.status_code, 400)
+        detail = ctx.exception.detail
+        assert isinstance(detail, dict)
+        self.assertEqual(detail.get("error"), "IDENTITY_LOCKED")
+
+    async def test_allows_non_identity_updates_when_locked(self) -> None:
+        contact = self._mock_contact()
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_get_lender_contact",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=contact,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_is_identity_locked",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=True,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            response = await smb_contact_service.update_smb_contact(
+                "contact-1",
+                "lender-1",
+                UpdateSMBContactRequest(monthly_revenue="$25,000", loan_type="term"),
+            )
+
+        contact.save.assert_awaited_once()
+        self.assertTrue(response.identity_locked)
+        self.assertEqual(response.monthly_revenue, "$25,000")
+        self.assertEqual(response.loan_type, "term")
+
+    async def test_updates_mobile_with_international_number(self) -> None:
+        contact = self._mock_contact()
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_get_lender_contact",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=contact,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_is_identity_locked",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=False,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            response = await smb_contact_service.update_smb_contact(
+                "contact-1",
+                "lender-1",
+                UpdateSMBContactRequest(mobile="8050306043"),
+            )
+
+        contact.save.assert_awaited_once()
+        self.assertEqual(contact.mobile, "+918050306043")
+        self.assertEqual(response.mobile, "+918050306043")
+
+    async def test_updates_loan_amount_and_comment(self) -> None:
+        contact = self._mock_contact()
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_get_lender_contact",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=contact,
+        ), patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "_is_identity_locked",
+            new_callable=AsyncMock,
+            return_value=False,
+        ):
+            response = await smb_contact_service.update_smb_contact(
+                "contact-1",
+                "lender-1",
+                UpdateSMBContactRequest(loan_amount=250000, comment="Follow up next week"),
+            )
+
+        contact.save.assert_awaited_once()
+        self.assertEqual(contact.loan_amount, 250000)
+        self.assertEqual(contact.comment, "Follow up next week")
+        self.assertEqual(response.loan_amount, 250000)
+        self.assertEqual(response.comment, "Follow up next week")
+
+
+class CreateContactTests(unittest.IsolatedAsyncioTestCase):
+    def _capture_factory(self, inserted: list[object]):
+        def capture_insert(**kwargs: object) -> MagicMock:
+            doc = MagicMock(**kwargs)
+            doc.id = "contact-new"
+            doc.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
+            doc.updated_at = None
+            doc.status = "NEW"
+            doc.loan_amount = None
+            doc.comment = None
+            doc.insert = AsyncMock(side_effect=lambda: inserted.append(doc))
+            return doc
+
+        return capture_insert
+
+    async def test_creates_contact_with_required_fields(self) -> None:
+        payload = CreateSMBContactRequest(
+            first_name="Gautam",
+            email="gautam@boost.money",
+            mobile="5125550142",
+        )
+        inserted: list[object] = []
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "SMBContact",
+        ) as contact_cls, patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            contact_cls.find_one = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
+            contact_cls.side_effect = self._capture_factory(inserted)
+
+            response = await smb_contact_service.create_smb_contact(payload, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        contact_cls.assert_called_once()
+        call_kwargs = contact_cls.call_args.kwargs
+        self.assertEqual(call_kwargs["first_name"], "Gautam")
+        self.assertEqual(call_kwargs["email"], "gautam@boost.money")
+        self.assertTrue(call_kwargs["mobile"].startswith("+1"))
+        self.assertEqual(len(inserted), 1)
+        self.assertEqual(response.first_name, "Gautam")
+        self.assertEqual(response.email, "gautam@boost.money")
+
+    async def test_creates_contact_with_indian_mobile(self) -> None:
+        payload = CreateSMBContactRequest(
+            first_name="Ananya",
+            email="ananya@boost.money",
+            mobile="8050306043",
+        )
+        inserted: list[object] = []
+
+        with patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service,
+            "SMBContact",
+        ) as contact_cls, patch.object(
+            smb_contact_service.settings,
+            "cartesia_default_phone_region",
+            "US",
+        ):
+            contact_cls.find_one = AsyncMock(return_value=None)
+            contact_cls.side_effect = self._capture_factory(inserted)
+
+            response = await smb_contact_service.create_smb_contact(payload, lender_id="lender-1")
+
+        call_kwargs = contact_cls.call_args.kwargs
+        self.assertEqual(call_kwargs["mobile"], "+918050306043")
+        self.assertEqual(response.mobile, "+918050306043")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_conversation.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_conversation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7f4952e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_conversation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+"""Tests for SMB invite advisor conversation flow."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+
+from agent.services.smbinvites.service import (
+    _build_tracking,
+    _next_prompt,
+    _seed_crm_hints,
+)
+
+
+def _make_invite() -> SimpleNamespace:
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        smb_first_name="Jane",
+        smb_last_name="Doe",
+        required_documents=[],
+        required_data_sources=[],
+    )
+
+
+class SMBInviteConversationTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_next_prompt_skips_time_in_business_and_monthly_revenue(self) -> None:
+        invite = _make_invite()
+        state = {
+            "name_confirmed": True,
+            "loan_amount": "50000",
+            "loan_type": "term",
+            "loan_purpose": "Expansion",
+            "entity_type": "llc",
+        }
+
+        prompt, is_complete = _next_prompt(invite, state)
+
+        self.assertFalse(is_complete)
+        self.assertEqual(prompt.step_id, "year_established")
+        self.assertNotIn(prompt.step_id, {"time_in_business", "monthly_revenue"})
+
+    def test_seed_crm_hints_applies_revenue_and_tenure_silently(self) -> None:
+        state: dict = {}
+        contact = SimpleNamespace(
+            loan_type="term",
+            monthly_revenue="$30,000",
+            time_in_business="36+ months",
+        )
+
+        changed = _seed_crm_hints(state, contact)
+
+        self.assertTrue(changed)
+        self.assertEqual(state["monthly_revenue"], "$30,000")
+        self.assertEqual(state["time_in_business"], "36+ months")
+        self.assertEqual(state["crm_hint_loan_type"], "term")
+
+
+class SMBInviteTrackingTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_connected_source_is_not_reported_as_pending(self) -> None:
+        invite = SimpleNamespace(
+            required_documents=[],
+            required_data_sources=["bank_account", "credit_report"],
+        )
+        state = {"connected_sources": ["bank_account"]}
+
+        tracking = _build_tracking(invite, state)
+
+        self.assertIn("bank_account", tracking.connected_sources)
+        self.assertNotIn("bank_account", tracking.pending_sources)
+        self.assertEqual(tracking.pending_sources, ["credit_report"])
+
+    def test_skipped_source_is_not_reported_as_pending(self) -> None:
+        invite = SimpleNamespace(
+            required_documents=[],
+            required_data_sources=["bank_account", "credit_report"],
+        )
+        state = {
+            "connected_sources": ["bank_account"],
+            "skipped_sources": ["credit_report"],
+        }
+
+        tracking = _build_tracking(invite, state)
+
+        self.assertEqual(tracking.pending_sources, [])
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_schemas.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_schemas.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9b3b6e7
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_smb_invite_schemas.py
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+"""Tests for SMB invite request schemas."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+from pydantic import ValidationError
+
+from agent.services.smbinvites.schemas import CreateInviteRequest
+
+
+class CreateInviteRequestTests(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_accepts_valid_loan_type_id(self) -> None:
+        req = CreateInviteRequest(
+            subject="Invitation to apply",
+            body="Please complete your application today.",
+            loan_type_id="sba7a",
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(req.loan_type_id, "sba7a")
+
+    def test_rejects_unknown_loan_type_id(self) -> None:
+        with self.assertRaises(ValidationError):
+            CreateInviteRequest(
+                subject="Invitation to apply",
+                body="Please complete your application today.",
+                loan_type_id="not-a-real-loan",
+            )
+
+    def test_omitted_loan_type_id_is_none(self) -> None:
+        req = CreateInviteRequest(
+            subject="Invitation to apply",
+            body="Please complete your application today.",
+        )
+        self.assertIsNone(req.loan_type_id)
+
+    def test_accepts_display_label_loan_type_id(self) -> None:
+        req = CreateInviteRequest(
+            subject="Invitation to apply",
+            body="Please complete your application today.",
+            loan_type_id="SBA 7(a) Loan",
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(req.loan_type_id, "sba7a")
+
+    def test_accepts_display_label_alias_loan_type_id(self) -> None:
+        req = CreateInviteRequest(
+            subject="Invitation to apply",
+            body="Please complete your application today.",
+            loan_type_id="SBA 504 Loan",
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(req.loan_type_id, "sba504")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
